title: Core probe assembly
abstract: A core probe assembly (10) for use in a cooking appliance (100) includes a core probe (20) and a cable (30); wherein the cable (30) includes a connector (40) for connection with a control unit (120) of a cooking appliance (100). The probe assembly (10) further includes a mounting (50) overmolded on the cable (30) between its ends (32, 34), wherein the mounting (50) is configured to be removably attached to an internal wall (112) of a cooking cavity (110) such that, in use, the cable (30) extends from an inside of the cooking cavity (110) to an outside of the cooking cavity (110) via the mounting (50).
claims: Claims 1. A core probe assembly (10) for use in a cooking appliance (100), the core probe assembly (10) comprising: a core probe (20) and a cable (30); wherein the core probe (20) comprises an insertion end at a first end (24) and a second end (26) connected the cable (30); wherein the cable (30) comprises a first end (32) connected to the second end (26) of the core probe (20) and a second end (34) comprising a connector (40) for connection with a control unit (120) of a cooking appliance (100), in use; wherein the probe assembly (10) further comprises a mounting (50) overmolded on the cable (30) between its ends (32, 34), wherein the mounting (50) is configured to be removably attached to an internal wall (1 12) of a cooking cavity (1 10) such that, in use, the cable (30) extends from an inside of the cooking cavity (1 10) to an outside of the cooking cavity (1 10) via the mounting (50). 2. A core probe assembly (10) according to claim 1 , wherein the mounting (50) is formed of plastic. 3. A core probe assembly (10) according to claim 1 or claim 2, wherein the mounting (50) comprises a cable guide portion (53) configured to guide the cable through an opening (114) in an internal wall (112) of the cooking cavity (1 10) from inside the cooking cavity (110) to outside the cooking cavity (1 10). 4. A core probe assembly (10) according to claim 3, wherein the cable guide portion (53) is arranged such that a first portion (36) of the cable (30) extending from one side of the cable guide portion (53) and a second portion (38) of the cable (30) extending from another side of the cable guide portion (53) extend substantially orthogonal to one another. 5. A core probe assembly (10) according to any preceding claim, wherein the mounting (50) comprises one or more flanges (54) having a respective aperture extending therethrough, wherein each aperture is arranged to receive a fixing (F) configured to attach the mounting (50) to an internal wall (112) of a cooking cavity (110), in use. 6. A core probe assembly (10) according to claim 5 when dependent on claim 3, wherein the mounting (50) comprises a pair of flanges (54), the pair of flanges comprising a respective flange located on either side of the cable guide portion (53) 7. A core probe assembly (10) according to claim 5 or claim 6, wherein the or each fixing (F) comprises a screw. 8. A core probe assembly (10) according to any preceding claim, wherein the core probe (20) comprises at least one temperature sensor. 9. A core probe assembly (10) according to any preceding claim, comprising a handle (60) overmolded across the connection between the core probe (20) and the cable (30). 10. A core probe assembly (10) according to claim 9, wherein the handle (60) is arranged such that a first portion (36) of the cable (30) extending from the handle (60), and the core probe (20) extend substantially orthogonal to one another. 11. A core probe assembly (10) according to any preceding claim, wherein the mounting (50) comprises a seal or gasket on a side configured to face the internal wall (112) of the cooking cavity (110). 12. A core probe assembly (10) according to any preceding claim, wherein the connector (40) is one of a male connector and a female connector, detachably connectable to a corresponding male connector or female connector of the control unit (120). 13. A core probe assembly (10) according to any one of claims 1 to 11 , wherein the connector (40) is a male connector, detachably connectable to a female connector of the control unit (120). 14. A core probe assembly (10) according to claim 12 or claim 13, wherein the connection of the male connector and female connector operatively connect the core probe (20) to the control unit (120) of the cooking appliance (100). 15. A cooking appliance (100) comprising: a cooking cavity (110) having an opening (1 14) extending through an internal wall (112) thereof; and a core probe assembly (10) according to any claims 1 to claim 14, wherein the mounting (50) is removably attached to the internal wall (1 12) of the cooking cavity (110) such that the cable (30) extends through the opening (1 14) from inside the cooking cavity (110) to outside the cooking cavity (110) via the mounting (50).
